game.step1: This is your score display, can go to negative sometimes, but don't worry about it.
game.step2: This is your game controls, drag dice to select them, and click/touch the selected score you want to save.
game.step3: Score board will show combinations you have scored so far, click to save.
game.step4: To save zero when there is no scoring combination, click/touch the combination name.
